name: Waimanalo Beach
tagline: The longest white sand beach on Oahu — nearly 4 miles backed by the Ko'olau mountains.
parking: Free lot at Waimanalo Beach Park
bestTime: Morning for calm water; any day — rarely crowded
talkStory: Great bodyboarding on small days too. The Ko'olau mountain backdrop makes this the most photogenic beach on the island — bring a camera. Don't leave valuables in car. Keneke's nearby has the best plate lunch in Waimanalo.
